title: ardisia coclensis
intro: Ardisia coclensis, also known as the Cocal orchid tree or Wild pepper, is a plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ardisia coclensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ardisia coclensis can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
